title: IP Extraction and Header Tagging Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → DDTrace\extract_ip_from_headers(array $headers): array  [PHP: ext/ddtrace.stub.php:695 / C: ddtrace.c:3910]
ddtrace_ip_extraction_find: IF DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_HEADER set → dd_fetch_arr_str(server, ipheader) → dd_parse_forwarded() or dd_parse_multiple_maybe_port()

ddtrace_ip_extraction_find: ELSE iterate priority_header_map (X-Forwarded-For, X-Real-IP, Forwarded, True-Client-IP, X-Client-IP, X-Forwarded, Forwarded-For, X-Cluster-Client-IP, Fastly-Client-IP, CF-Connecting-IP, CF-Connecting-IPv6)
priority_header_map → parse_fn(value, &out): returns extract_res{success, is_private}  [prefer first public IP; track first private]
ddtrace_ip_extraction_find: FALLBACK to REMOTE_ADDR via dd_parse_plain() if no public IP found
ddtrace_ip_extraction_find → dd_ipaddr_to_zstr(&out): returns normalized IP string
ddtrace_extract_ip_from_headers → zend_hash_str_update(meta, 'http.client_ip', val)  [sets tag in meta array]
Caller → DDTrace\root_span(): RootSpanData|null  [ddtrace.c; calls ddtrace_root_span() on active stack]
SwooleIntegration (alt path): $rootSpan->meta += $res  [SwooleIntegration.php:64; merges result directly onto root span meta]
serializer.c (auto path): ddtrace_extract_ip_from_headers(&server_zv, meta) called automatically during span serialization when DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_ENABLED=true  [serializer.c:678]
Caller → DDTrace\add_global_tag(string $key, string $value): void  [ddtrace.c:2064; writes to DDTRACE_G(additional_global_tags) hash]
add_global_tag → Every new span created inherits global tags from additional_global_tags

key_data_structures.SpanData: class; props: name, resource, service, type, meta(string[]), metrics(float[]), peerServiceSources, parent(SpanData|null), stack(SpanStack), links, events, id(readonly), baggage
key_data_structures.RootSpanData: extends SpanData; adds: origin, propagatedTags, samplingPriority, traceId, parentId, tracestate, tracestateTags, gitMetadata, inferredSpan
key_data_structures.ipaddr: C struct {int af, union{in_addr v4, in6_addr v6}}
key_data_structures.header_map_node: C struct {zend_string *key (HTTP_ prefixed), zend_string *name (canonical), extract_func_t parse_fn}

ip_selection_rules: Custom header (DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_HEADER) takes precedence over all priority headers
First public (non-private) IP wins; private IPs are retained as fallback
IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses (::ffff:x.x.x.x) are normalized to IPv4
IPv4+port pairs (1.2.3.4:456) and IPv6+port ([2001::1]:1111) are stripped to IP only
key_relationships: ddtrace_extract_ip_from_headers calls ddtrace_ip_extraction_find and writes 'http.client_ip' to meta hash
ddtrace_ip_extraction_find is exported (DDTRACE_PUBLIC) — also used by appsec extension (ddtrace.sym:12)
active_span() returns SpanData on top of SpanStack; root_span() returns RootSpanData at stack base
SpanData::$meta (string[]) is the direct write target for 'http.client_ip' tag
add_global_tag updates DDTRACE_G(additional_global_tags) — applied to all new spans globally
serializer.c auto-calls ddtrace_extract_ip_from_headers during web span serialization (DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_ENABLED guard)

configuration_flags.DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_ENABLED: bool — enables automatic IP extraction in serializer
configuration_flags.DD_TRACE_CLIENT_IP_HEADER: string — custom header name overriding priority header scan

appsec_integration: appsec/src/extension/tags.c defines DD_TAG_HTTP_CLIENT_IP='http.client_ip'; dd_tags_add_tags() writes client IP to span meta via dd_trace_span_add_tag()
important_notes: extract_ip_from_headers returns an array (metadata format), not a raw string. The caller must read ['http.client_ip'] key. In automatic mode (serializer), this is written directly to the span's meta hash. In Swoole/manual mode, caller merges the result into $rootSpan->meta. ddtrace_ip_extraction_find is a public C symbol exported for use by the AppSec extension.
